problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: The key to How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? is Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type — specifically Stem cell differentiation — which would help 500,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
